$comment: Paused defensive headers. Paste these `headers` entries into the `/(.*)` source block of vercel.json (alongside the active COOP/COEP/CORP block) to re-enable the strict security posture. The /assets/(.*) cache-control entry stays separate.

headers.value: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' blob: data:; media-src 'self' blob:; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval' 'unsafe-eval' 'unsafe-inline' blob: https://va.vercel-scripts.com https://cdn.jsdelivr.net; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' https://*.edgeimpulse.com https://api-inference.huggingface.co https://va.vercel-scripts.com https://*.vercel-insights.com https://cdn.jsdelivr.net https://storage.googleapis.com; worker-src 'self' blob:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors *
